hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
hero_height: full viewport — 100vh with scroll cue below
nav_style: minimal floating — small pill in corner
scroll_animation: moderate — staggered entrance of cards and elements
hover_effects: subtle — slight lift or color shift on cards
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
quirk: use a single accent color — everything else is grayscale
bonus_quirk: add a tiny animated element somewhere (spinning gear, blinking cursor, floating shape)
